---
title: "Inaugural US Muon Collider Collaboration meeting"
date: 2024-08-12
date-modified: 2024-08-12
categories:
  - conferences
  - accelerators
toc: false
---

The [US Muon Collider Collaboration (IMCC)](https://www.muoncollider.us) held their first meeting at Fermilab last week. Looks like it was around 80% particle physics, 20% accelerator physics. All the presentation slides are online [here](https://indico.fnal.gov/event/64493/timetable/?view=standard).
